notes: Pilot region edges. Distances and gains derived from AllTrails official MCP pulls on 2026-07-13 (Lower Lena Lake Trail 6.4 mi RT +1548 ft; Lena Lake to Upper Lena Lake 13.4 mi RT +4655 ft); one-way splits are estimates, est_gain flagged.

edges.src: AllTrails official MCP 2026-07-13: 6.4 RT +1548, split est
edges.tread_src: AllTrails 2026-07-22: the lower 3 mi is wide, well maintained, easy to moderate; owner ground truth agrees (smooth tread, early gentle grade praised)

edges.src: AllTrails official MCP 2026-07-13: 13.4 RT +4655 minus lower leg; steep section
edges.tread_src: AllTrails 2026-07-22 (difficulty Hard; review names steep sections, rocky terrain, a tough final mile) plus owner ground truth: rocky and rooty, brutal even without a pack
